sentence: 这位史学家写了很多关于汉代的书。
pinyin: Zhè wèi shǐxuéjiā xiě le hěn duō guānyú Hàndài de shū.
english: This historian has written many books about the Han dynasty.

sentence: 他三十岁就成了百万富翁。
pinyin: Tā sānshí suì jiù chéng le bǎiwàn fùwēng.
english: He became a millionaire at the age of thirty.

sentence: 请把文件保存到磁盘上。
pinyin: Qǐng bǎ wénjiàn bǎocún dào cípán shang.
english: Please save the file to the disk.

sentence: 瑞士的货币单位是法郎。
pinyin: Ruìshì de huòbì dānwèi shì fǎláng.
english: The monetary unit of Switzerland is the franc.

sentence: 他放弃神职回到了家乡。
pinyin: Tā fàngqì shénzhí huídào le jiāxiāng.
english: He gave up his clerical position and returned to his hometown.
